introSection: Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at West Sands Fun Fair in England, UK. It is the only coaster currently operating at the park. It previously operated at Flamingo Park from 1998 to 2011.
fullText:
Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at West Sands Fun Fair in England, UK. It is the only coaster currently operating at the park. It previously operated at Flamingo Park from 1998 to 2011.

Standard Wacky Worm layout.
